## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated (the suite is stdlib-only, no network)
- [ ] Docs updated in the same PR (README / `docs/`) if a flag, command, or behavior changed
- [ ] No new Python dependencies (loopd is stdlib-only)
- [ ] Keeps the engine agnostic (no GitHub/forecast/analysis specifics in `loop.py`)
